claims.statement: On this machine and the recorded no-op Patch workload, seven unchanged entries totaling 3128791 compressed bytes were raw-copied exactly; median save time was 19/21/25 ms for requested DEFLATE levels 1/3/6 and output size remained 3129601 bytes.
For document-properties Patch, five unchanged entries totaling 3128295 compressed bytes were raw-copied while 1039 logical bytes were rewritten; median save time was 15/24/41 ms at levels 1/3/6.

For full worksheet rewrite, level 1 versus level 6 reduced median save time from 1157 ms to 221 ms for targeted replace and from 1128 ms to 302 ms for upsert, while output grew by 9.68% and 9.73% on these workloads.
The matrix runner verified exact compressed-payload equality for every planned raw-copy entry, and all twelve representative level/scenario outputs opened with openpyxl.
